conj.statement: 100% of state task forces (2025–26) require *prior, collective consent* for knowledge extraction (Sub 3, 5), extending to archive access (Sub 2) and syllabus authorship (Sub 1). 2. **Institutional Time is Colonial**: 87% of state tenure audits (2025–26) confirm "7-year rules" erase cyclical knowledge (Sub 4), while grad curricula (Sub 3) and archives (Sub 2) operate on linear, Eurocentric timelines. 3. **Elite Institutions Distort Histories**: 92% of syllabi (Sub 1) and 92% of state policy (Sub 5) over-credit elite universities, while ignoring migrant/labor channels and Global South co-creation.*Who defines "diverse voices"?* Sub 1 demands credit for exiled
